channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: At least eight people have been killed and nearly 100 injured following a US strike on a bridge connecting the city of Karaj to Iran's capital Tehran, according to local officials. #Karaj #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: At least eight people have been killed and nearly 100 injured following a US strike on a bridge connecting the city of Karaj to Iran's capital Tehran, according to local officials. #Karaj #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Tiger Woods was arrested for driving under the influence after a car crash in Florida last month. He submitted a written plea of not guilty via his lawyers on Tuesday. #TigerWoods #Florida #Golf #News #BBCNews
item.description: Tiger Woods was arrested for driving under the influence after a car crash in Florida last month. He submitted a written plea of not guilty via his lawyers on Tuesday. #TigerWoods #Florida #Golf #News #BBCNews

item.title: A hiker who was injured when she fell from a 180-foot waterfall in New Zealand was forced to evacuate without her dog, which couldn’t be found. After strangers raised thousands of dollars for a search, border collie Molly was flown to safety by a helicopt
item.description: A hiker who was injured when she fell from a 180-foot waterfall in New Zealand was forced to evacuate without her dog, which couldn’t be found. After strangers raised thousands of dollars for a search, border collie Molly was flown to safety by a helicopt

item.title: Two boys, aged 14 and 16, and an 18-year-old man have been arrested on suspicion of murder in connection with the incident. #Woolwich #London #CrimeTok #BBCNews
item.description: Two boys, aged 14 and 16, and an 18-year-old man have been arrested on suspicion of murder in connection with the incident. #Woolwich #London #CrimeTok #BBCNews

item.title: The mission will set the stage for a crewed lunar landing currently scheduled for 2028. #NASA #Artemis #Space #Climate #BBCNews
item.description: The mission will set the stage for a crewed lunar landing currently scheduled for 2028. #NASA #Artemis #Space #Climate #BBCNews

item.title: Multiple weapons experts have disputed a US claim that Iran may have been responsible for a deadly strike on the town of Lamerd on the first day of the war. #Iran #US #Israel #USNews #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Multiple weapons experts have disputed a US claim that Iran may have been responsible for a deadly strike on the town of Lamerd on the first day of the war. #Iran #US #Israel #USNews #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: A search and rescue effort is under way for a downed US F-15 fighter jet in southern Iran, two sources confirmed to CBS News, the BBC's US news partner. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #FighterJet #News #BBCNews
item.description: A search and rescue effort is under way for a downed US F-15 fighter jet in southern Iran, two sources confirmed to CBS News, the BBC's US news partner. #Iran #MiddleEast #US #FighterJet #News #BBCNews

item.title: Popular indie horror game Poppy Playtime has faced criticism over its chase sequences and the way new characters are introduced only to be killed off in the same chapter. #PoppyPlaytime #PoppyPlaytimeChapter5 #MobEntertainment #Markiplier #BBCGaming #BBCN
item.description: Popular indie horror game Poppy Playtime has faced criticism over its chase sequences and the way new characters are introduced only to be killed off in the same chapter. #PoppyPlaytime #PoppyPlaytimeChapter5 #MobEntertainment #Markiplier #BBCGaming #BBCN

item.title: No-one has yet been charged in connection to the shooting. #Williamsburg #Brooklyn #NewYork #News #BBCNews
item.description: No-one has yet been charged in connection to the shooting. #Williamsburg #Brooklyn #NewYork #News #BBCNews

item.title: BBC Verify has confirmed that a video showing what appears to be a US plane accompanied by two helicopters was filmed in Khuzestan province in southern Iran. It follows reports from the US that a search and rescue operation is under way for the crew of a
item.description: BBC Verify has confirmed that a video showing what appears to be a US plane accompanied by two helicopters was filmed in Khuzestan province in southern Iran. It follows reports from the US that a search and rescue operation is under way for the crew of a

item.title: The first game had more than 17 million players worldwide at its peak and the sequel, PowerWash Simulator 2, has been nominated for two awards at the Bafta Games Awards this month. #PowerWashSImulator #PowerWashSimulator2 #Gaming #GameTok #BaftaGamesAward
item.description: The first game had more than 17 million players worldwide at its peak and the sequel, PowerWash Simulator 2, has been nominated for two awards at the Bafta Games Awards this month. #PowerWashSImulator #PowerWashSimulator2 #Gaming #GameTok #BaftaGamesAward

item.title: “For the first time since 1972 since apollo 17, human beings have left Earth’s orbit.” #Artemis #ArtemisII #NASA #Space #BBCNews
item.description: “For the first time since 1972 since apollo 17, human beings have left Earth’s orbit.” #Artemis #ArtemisII #NASA #Space #BBCNews

item.title: Nasa has shared the first high-resolution images of the Earth taken by the Artemis II crew as they continue on their trip around the Moon. #ArtemisII #Moon #Nasa #Space #BBCNews
item.description: Nasa has shared the first high-resolution images of the Earth taken by the Artemis II crew as they continue on their trip around the Moon. #ArtemisII #Moon #Nasa #Space #BBCNews

item.title: Is ube the new matcha? #Ube #Matcha #Drink #ViralDrinks #Costa #Coffee #BBCNews
item.description: Is ube the new matcha?  #Ube #Matcha #Drink #ViralDrinks #Costa #Coffee #BBCNews

item.title: Rapper Gucci Mane was allegedly kidnapped at gunpoint in Dallas earlier this year, leading to the arrests of eight men, including a fellow artist signed to his label, officials say. #GucciMane #Rap #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Rapper Gucci Mane was allegedly kidnapped at gunpoint in Dallas earlier this year, leading to the arrests of eight men, including a fellow artist signed to his label, officials say. #GucciMane #Rap #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The Israeli military said it had begun striking "Hezbollah infrastructure" in Beirut after it destroyed a bridge in eastern Lebanon to prevent the Iran-backed group's reinforcements from crossing. #Israel #Iran #Beirut #Lebanon #BBCNews
item.description: The Israeli military said it had begun striking "Hezbollah infrastructure" in Beirut after it destroyed a bridge in eastern Lebanon to prevent the Iran-backed group's reinforcements from crossing. #Israel #Iran #Beirut #Lebanon #BBCNews

item.title: The missing airman, a weapon systems officer, was aboard a US F-15 fighter jet that was downed in southern Iran. #US #Iran #Jet #Airman #BBCNews
item.description: The missing airman, a weapon systems officer, was aboard a US F-15 fighter jet that was downed in southern Iran. #US #Iran #Jet #Airman #BBCNews

item.title: The Met Office said injuries or danger to life could occur as a result of flying debris. #StormDave #Storm #Weather #UK #BBCNews
item.description: The Met Office said injuries or danger to life could occur as a result of flying debris. #StormDave #Storm #Weather #UK #BBCNews

item.title: It rained marshmallows as kids raced to collect them as they dropped from a helicopter. #Easter #US #Michagan #MarshmallowDrop #BBCNews
item.description: It rained marshmallows as kids raced to collect them as they dropped from a helicopter. #Easter #US #Michagan #MarshmallowDrop #BBCNews

item.title: Located near San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz used to be one of the US’s most notorious prisons, but is now a tourist attraction. #Alcatraz #SanFrancisco #Trump #Prison #BBCNews
item.description: Located near San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz used to be one of the US’s most notorious prisons, but is now a tourist attraction. #Alcatraz #SanFrancisco #Trump #Prison #BBCNews

item.title: Do you get enough social interaction? #Socialising#Friends #Introvert #Science #NeuroScience #BBCNews
item.description: Do you get enough social interaction? #Socialising#Friends #Introvert #Science #NeuroScience #BBCNews

item.title: The operation to rescue the weapon systems officer involved hundreds of US troops and dozens of warplanes, the BBC's US media partner CBS reported. #Airman #Iran #US #Troops #BBCNews
item.description: The operation to rescue the weapon systems officer involved hundreds of US troops and dozens of warplanes, the BBC's US media partner CBS reported. #Airman #Iran #US #Troops #BBCNews

item.title: While the booming romantasy genre offers escapism, it faces significant criticism for a lack of diversity in its most popular, mainstream titles. #Romantasy #Diversity #Books #Reading #BBCNews
item.description: While the booming romantasy genre offers escapism, it faces significant criticism for a lack of diversity in its most popular, mainstream titles. #Romantasy #Diversity #Books #Reading #BBCNews

item.title: Two crew members were on board the jet, and both ejected from the plane. One of them had already been rescued by US forces. #US #Iran #Airman #Jet #BBCNews
item.description: Two crew members were on board the jet, and both ejected from the plane. One of them had already been rescued by US forces. #US #Iran #Airman #Jet #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump has issued an expletive-laden threat against Iran's infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened. #US #Iran #StraitOfHormuz #Trump #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued an expletive-laden threat against Iran's infrastructure if the Strait of Hormuz is not opened. #US #Iran #StraitOfHormuz #Trump #BBCNews

item.title: “Men tend to blame the mother; it all comes down to knowledge.” Onil is raising his two autistic children with his wife Angela in Malawi, where support is scarce. #AutismAwarenessMonth #Autism #Malawi #Africa #BBCAfricaEye #News #BBCNews
item.description: “Men tend to blame the mother; it all comes down to knowledge.” Onil is raising his two autistic children with his wife Angela in Malawi, where support is scarce. #AutismAwarenessMonth #Autism #Malawi #Africa  #BBCAfricaEye #News #BBCNews

item.title: Kanye West has not performed in the UK since 2015 when he headlined Glastonbury. #KanyeWest #Wireless #WirelessFestival #London #News #BBCNews
item.description: Kanye West has not performed in the UK since 2015 when he headlined Glastonbury. #KanyeWest #Wireless #WirelessFestival #London #News #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it fails to meet his new Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, which has been effectively blocked since the war began. #StraitOfHormuz #Iran #DonaldTrump #Mi
item.description: US President Donald Trump has threatened to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it fails to meet his new Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, which has been effectively blocked since the war began. #StraitOfHormuz #Iran #DonaldTrump #Mi

item.description: This is what the inside of the Artemis II mission control centre looks like. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #BBCNews

item.title: Mmm rehydrated shrimp cocktail 😋. #Artemis #Nasa #Space #News #BBCNews
